ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Vault layout: the vault root is
ast.target: 保险库布局：保险库根目录是

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: itself (legacy mode). Paths below are vault-relative.
ast.target: 本身（旧版模式）。以下路径相对于保险库。

ast.name: appendText
ast.target: 保险库布局：项目根目录，其中

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: as a child dir. Kandyban reads it via vault.adapter (Obsidian's indexer skips dotdirs). Paths below are relative to
ast.target: 作为子目录。Kandyban 通过 vault.adapter 读取它（Obsidian 的索引器会跳过以点开头的目录）。以下路径相对于

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: No project detected in this vault. Kandyban looks for
ast.target: 在此保险库中未检测到项目。Kandyban 会在保险库根目录查找

ast.name: appendText
ast.target: 的旧项目也会被检测到。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Scanned for legacy backlog items (filenames starting with bl-). Leave blank to disable.
ast.target: 扫描旧版待办事项（文件名以 bl- 开头）。留空以禁用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Scanned for current issues (filenames starting with i-). Leave blank to disable.
ast.target: 扫描当前问题（文件名以 i- 开头）。留空以禁用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Scanned for milestone files (filenames starting with ms-).
ast.target: 扫描里程碑文件（文件名以 ms- 开头）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Comma-separated values the cycle-status command rotates through. Default: open, in-progress, done.
ast.target: cycle-status 命令循环使用的逗号分隔值。默认值：open, in-progress, done。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Comma-separated values the cycle-horizon command rotates through. Default: now, next, sooner, soon, later, someday.
ast.target: cycle-horizon 命令循环使用的逗号分隔值。默认值：now, next, sooner, soon, later, someday。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Kandyban: running in project-root mode. Install a show-hidden-files community plugin to let click-to-open land in Obsidian instead of the system handler.
ast.target: Kandyban：正在以项目根目录模式运行。安装一个显示隐藏文件的社区插件，以便点击打开时在 Obsidian 中打开，而不是由系统处理程序打开。

ast.name: body
ast.source: Flow mode is for early-exploration solo work where SweetClaude infers what you're doing without ceremony. There aren't tracked work items to render here.
ast.target: 流程模式适用于早期探索性的独立工作，SweetClaude 会推断您正在做什么，无需繁琐仪式。这里没有要显示的跟踪工作项。

ast.name: body
ast.source: In Shape Up mode, new work enters through pitches with a fixed appetite, not a backlog. The kanban board doesn't apply here.
ast.target: 在 Shape Up 模式下，新工作通过具有固定胃口的提案进入，而不是待办事项列表。看板视图在此不适用。

ast.name: heading
ast.source: Flow mode — work is inferred, not tracked
ast.target: 流程模式 — 工作由推断产生，而非跟踪

ast.name: heading
ast.source: Shape Up mode — no backlog by design
ast.target: Shape Up 模式 — 设计上无待办事项列表

ast.name: hint
ast.source: Switch to kanban or agile mode in SweetClaude (run /sweetclaude:project-mode shift kanban) when you want a board.
ast.target: 当您需要看板时，请在 SweetClaude 中切换到看板或敏捷模式（运行 /sweetclaude:project-mode shift kanban）。

ast.name: hint
ast.source: A pitch-board view is on the Kandyban roadmap. For now, browse pitches in Obsidian's native pane.
ast.target: 提案看板视图已在 Kandyban 路线图中。目前，请在 Obsidian 的原生窗格中浏览提案。

ast.name: name
ast.source: Rescan vault and show cache hint
ast.target: 重新扫描保险库并显示缓存提示
